description: C# program with System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates 6.0.0 dependency but no code path reaches the vulnerable Import() method. CVE-2023-29331 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Program only prints a message. No X509 code is used at all despite the package being declared as a dependency.

findings.human_justification: No code in the project uses any X509 APIs. The package is declared as a dependency but completely unused in the source code.
